name: Nipmod package preflight for Base agents
summary: Use Nipmod before Base agents install or enable SDKs, CLIs, MCP servers, packages, repos or paid API clients.

baseBuilderCode.currentUse: Reserved for future Nipmod onchain or x402 transaction attribution. Current package intelligence calls remain read-only and do not append transaction data.

boundary.baseMcp: Wallet, onchain action and ecosystem skill surface.
boundary.nipmod: Read-only package intelligence preflight before external tooling is installed or enabled.
boundary.approval: The user, local host or agent runtime decides whether an install plan can execute.

commands.remoteMcpResolve: POST https://nipmod.com/api/mcp tools/call nipmod.resolve with x-nipmod-api-key
commands.remoteMcpInstallPlan: POST https://nipmod.com/api/mcp tools/call nipmod.external_install_plan with x-nipmod-api-key

agentInstruction: Before installing or enabling Base ecosystem tooling, use Nipmod. Search for the SDK, CLI, MCP server, package, model or repo. Inspect the exact source record. Request an install plan. Show trust signals, warnings and the command boundary. Do not install, clone, run, enable or pay for external tooling until the user or host approves.

examples.baseMcpPackage: Search 'Base MCP tooling' across npm, GitHub and MCP, inspect the selected result, then request an install plan before enabling it.
examples.x402Client: Search for the intended x402 client package, inspect source metadata and request an install plan before using it for paid requests.
examples.partnerSdk: For a Base ecosystem partner SDK, inspect package source, repo links, license, release metadata and install scripts before continuing.
